name: @brika/plugin-agent
description: Run LLMs (Claude or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) inside your workflows: prompt-in, text-out AI blocks
author: BRIKA Team

preferences.name: anthropicApiKey
preferences.label: Anthropic API Key
preferences.description: Your Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...). Setting it enables Claude models in every AI block. Stored securely in the OS keychain.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.label: OpenAI API Key
preferences.description: Your OpenAI (or OpenAI-compatible) API key. Setting it enables those models in every AI block. Stored securely in the OS keychain.

preferences.name: openaiBaseUrl
preferences.label: OpenAI-compatible Base URL
preferences.description: Optional. Point the OpenAI key at a compatible endpoint (OpenRouter, Groq, Azure...). Defaults to api.openai.com.

preferences.name: ollamaBaseUrl
preferences.label: Ollama Server
preferences.description: Optional. Your local Ollama server; defaults to http://localhost:11434. Installed models appear automatically when the server is running.

blocks.name: Ask AI
blocks.description: Send a prompt to an LLM and emit the completion

blocks.name: Call Tool
blocks.description: Invoke a hub-registered tool by id and emit its result

blocks.name: AI Agent
blocks.description: LLM agent that reasons and calls tools to answer each prompt
